::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="35%"}

![](images/profile.jpg){fig-alt="Olawale Olaniyan" width="250px" .rounded-image}

:::

::: {.column width="65%"}

# Olawale Olaniyan

## Biostatistics & Data Science Researcher

I use statistical modeling, machine learning, and epidemiological analysis
to solve healthcare and public health problems.

[View Projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/olawale-olaniyan/){.btn .btn-outline-dark}

:::

:::

## About Me

I am passionate about using data science and statistical methods
to solve healthcare and public health challenges.

My interests include:
- Machine Learning
- Biostatistics
- Epidemiology
- Predictive Modeling

---

## Featured Projects

### Heart Disease Prediction
Machine learning analysis of cardiovascular disease risk.

### Human Stress Prediction
Predictive modeling for stress analysis.

### Cancer Incidence Analysis
Statistical analysis of cancer trends.
